contracts.proofRequired: CMD can invoke reboot script without AI
contracts.failCondition: entrypoint missing, hangs on pause in test mode, or stable gap is reported as generic failure
contracts.nextOwner: Agent C - External runner / launcher / lifecycle

contracts.proofRequired: runner observes stop sentinel and exits cleanly
contracts.passCondition: summary stopReason is operator_stop_forge_stop or equivalent operator stop class
contracts.failCondition: ForgeStop cannot be invoked noninteractively or runner ignores sentinel
contracts.nextOwner: Agent C - External runner / launcher / lifecycle

contracts.proofRequired: Ctrl+C is classified locally rather than becoming an unstructured abort
contracts.passCondition: finalClassification is operator_stop_ctrl_c and summary is written when parent observes Ctrl+C
contracts.failCondition: Ctrl+C produces no local summary or no stop class
contracts.nextOwner: Agent C - External runner / launcher / lifecycle

contracts.proofRequired: escape menu / operator interruption is engine truth
contracts.passCondition: runner stops on operator interruption and only resumes paused campaign map when not operator-interrupted
contracts.failCondition: escape_menu treated as normal assist surface
contracts.nextOwner: Agent B - Runtime / Readiness / Gameplay state truth

contracts.proofRequired: alt-tab or user foreground control stops the loop
contracts.failCondition: runner keeps issuing commands while user foreground is elsewhere
contracts.nextOwner: Agent C - External runner / launcher / lifecycle

contracts.proofRequired: travel branch has a named engine target
contracts.passCondition: runner sees recursiveBranchState target or blocks with handoff_missing_travel_target
contracts.failCondition: travel command sent without target/source classification
contracts.nextOwner: Agent B - Runtime / Readiness / Gameplay state truth

contracts.consumer: assistive command timeline and Reboot classifier
contracts.proofRequired: target source is explicit: parameter, recursiveBranchState, CampaignGovernorDecision, RouteCouncil, RuntimeRegent, or missing_engine_handoff_target
contracts.passCondition: runner records target source and blocks missing target instead of inventing one
contracts.failCondition: hardcoded default target or unclassified fallback
contracts.nextOwner: Agent C - External runner / launcher / lifecycle

contracts.consumer: runner command timeline and checkpoint events
contracts.proofRequired: command was acknowledged before movement proof is evaluated
contracts.passCondition: command result Success and execute_ack checkpoint exist
contracts.failCondition: movement proof claimed without command ack
contracts.nextOwner: Agent C - External runner / launcher / lifecycle

contracts.passCondition: party_movement_observed checkpoint and visible_mechanics_proof require positive movement delta
contracts.failCondition: attach readiness or route intent counted as visible movement
contracts.nextOwner: Agent B - Runtime / Readiness / Gameplay state truth

contracts.passCondition: stable_gap stops loop and writes patch-ready local handoff
contracts.failCondition: same context keeps looping or requires AI to compare logs
contracts.nextOwner: Agent D - Docs / atlas / routing board
